items.title: CVE-2025-66786 | OpenAirInterface CN5G AMF up to 2.0.1 SBI Interface denial of service
items.author: vuldb.com
items.content: A vulnerability was found in OpenAirInterface CN5G AMF up to 2.0.1. It has been declared as problematic. Affected by this issue is some unknown functionality of the component SBI Interface. The manipulation results in denial of service. This vulnerability is reported as CVE-2025-66786. The attack can be launched remotely. No exploit exists.

items.title: CVE-2025-65805 | OpenAirInterface CN5G AMF up to 2.1.9 NAS Message privilege escalation
items.author: vuldb.com
items.content: A vulnerability was found in OpenAirInterface CN5G AMF up to 2.1.9. It has been classified as critical. Affected by this vulnerability is an unknown functionality of the component NAS Message Handler. The manipulation leads to privilege escalation. This vulnerability is documented as CVE-2025-65805. items.title: CVE-2025-66560 | quarkusio quarkus up to 3.20.4/3.27.1/3.30.x HTTP Layer allocation of resources (GHSA-5rfx-cp42-p624)
items.author: vuldb.com
items.content: A vulnerability was found in quarkusio quarkus up to 3.20.4/3.27.1/3.30.x and classified as critical. Affected is an unknown function of the component HTTP Layer. Executing a manipulation can lead to allocation of resources. This vulnerability is registered as CVE-2025-66560. It is possible to launch the attack remotely. No exploit is available. It is suggested to upgrade the affected component.

items.title: CVE-2026-22188 | Panda3D up to 1.10.16 alloca argv_copy/argv_copy2 uninitialized variable
items.author: vuldb.com
items.content: A vulnerability has been found in Panda3D up to 1.10.16 and classified as problematic. This impacts the function alloca. Performing a manipulation of the argument argv_copy/argv_copy2 results in use of uninitialized variable. This vulnerability is cataloged as CVE-2026-22188. The attack must be initiated from a local position. There is no exploit available.

items.title: CVE-2026-22187 | Open Microscopy Environment Bio-Formats up to 8.3.0 loci.formats.Memoizer deserialization
items.author: vuldb.com
items.content: A vulnerability, which was classified as problematic, was found in Open Microscopy Environment Bio-Formats up to 8.3.0. This affects the function loci.formats.Memoizer. Such manipulation leads to deserialization. This vulnerability is listed as CVE-2026-22187. The attack must be carried out locally. There is no available exploit.

items.title: CVE-2026-20026 | Cisco Secure Firewall Threat Defense Software Snort 3 Detection Engine double free (cisco-sa-snort3-dcerpc-vulns-J9HNF4tH)
items.author: vuldb.com
items.content: A vulnerability, which was classified as problematic, has been found in Cisco Secure Firewall Threat Defense Software and UTD SNORT IPS Engine Software. The impacted element is an unknown function of the component Snort 3 Detection Engine. This manipulation causes double free. This vulnerability is tracked as CVE-2026-20026. items.content: A vulnerability classified as problematic was found in Cisco Secure Firewall Threat Defense Software and UTD SNORT IPS Engine Software. items.title: CVE-2026-20029 | Cisco Identity Services Engine Software up to 3.4.0 xml external entity reference (cisco-sa-ise-xxe-jWSbSDKt / Nessus ID 282331)
items.author: vuldb.com
